fields.label: Enabled
fields.description: Turn on once credentials and folder/sheet are configured.

fields.label: Service Account JSON
fields.description: Paste the Google service-account credentials JSON (Sheets + Drive scopes). Share the target Sheet and Drive folder with this service account's email.

fields.label: Drive Root Folder ID
fields.description: Google Drive folder ID (from the folder URL) that DIRECTLY contains the month sub-folders (April/May/June...). For the shared F.Y.26-27 folder, use its ID and leave F.Y. Label blank.

fields.label: F.Y. Folder Label (optional)
fields.description: Leave blank when the Drive Root Folder already contains the months. Only set this if your root has an extra F.Y. sub-folder (e.g. 'F.Y.26-27') above the months.
